name: Chinese Onion Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the unbleached flour and water in a large bowl. Mix until smooth.
2. Knead the dough for about 10 minutes, then cover with a damp cloth and let stand for 15 to 20 minutes.
3. Divide the dough into four equal parts.
4. Mince the green onions and divide them into four equal parts.
5. Roll each dough section into a thin pancake using a rolling pin.
6. Spread 1 tbsp lard evenly over the surface of each pancake, then sprinkle 1/2 tsp course sea salt evenly over each.
7. Evenly spread the minced green onions over each pancake.
8. Roll each pancake tightly into long rolls, coil them, and pinch the ends.
9. Using a rolling pin, roll each roll into four 8-inch pancakes.
10. Fry the pancakes for 1 to 2 minutes on each side, then cover with a lid and steam briefly.
11. Cut into sections. Serves 4 as a side dish or 8 as an appetizer.
Note: This recipe is attributed to Sandy in sunny Fl (rvgd23a).
